pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh which explicitly creates this file.
Found in export_result.sh which writes output to this exact path.
Verified via ArduPilot parameter documentation web search and setup_task.sh instructions mapping.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated ArduPilot configuration instructions. Verified via ArduPilot parameter documentation that the requested RELAY_PIN (54) matches AUX 5, RC9_OPTION (28) correctly maps to Relay 1 On/Off, and the requested navigation parameters are WPNAV_SPEED (300 cm/s for 3 m/s), WPNAV_ACCEL (100 cm/s/s for 1 m/s/s), and RTL_ALT (5000 cm for 50 m), perfectly matching the verifier logic.
